message:
feat(abi): port 5 Itanium C++ ABI fail-stop stubs (bd-jgdmx)

Add the missing fail-stop entries the C++ compiler emits at link time
but that callers never expect to return. Without them, every C++
binary linked against frankenlibc fails at link time with undefined
references. Each mirrors the existing __cxa_pure_virtual /
__cxa_throw_bad_array_new_length / __cxa_call_unexpected pattern:
write a one-line diagnostic to fd 2 and call abort().

  - __cxa_call_terminate(*mut c_void) -> ! — invoked by personality
    routine when an exception escapes a noexcept boundary
  - __cxa_deleted_virtual() -> ! — vtable slot for `= delete` virtual
    members dispatched through a base pointer
  - __cxa_bad_cast() -> ! — dynamic_cast<T&> failure
  - __cxa_bad_typeid() -> ! — typeid(*p) with p == nullptr
  - __cxa_throw_bad_array_length() -> ! — new T[n] with negative n

Tests: 5 new fork+waitpid tests verifying SIGABRT termination, modeled
on the existing cxa_*_aborts_child_process pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
